query: What is the most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure for 2026, latest available as of late June 2026? Report the exact YTD acres and date.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary:

## Answer

**The most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure is 3,330,901 acres, dated July 6, 2026.** This is accompanied by 37,209 year-to-date wildfires.

### Critical caveat on "late June 2026"
The NIFC live pages (Statistics and National Fire News) display **only a single, continuously-updated current cumulative total** — they do not archive a separate dated "late-June" snapshot. Key points:

- The National Fire News narrative page carries a **July 6, 2026 dateline** with the 3,330,901-acre figure.
- The "**as of June 29, 2026**" text on the page refers to the **National Preparedness Level scale**, NOT the acres-burned figure — this is a common point of confusion.
- The value visible for "late June 2026" on the live pages has since rolled forward to the July 6 update, since NIFC overwrites the current total with each Monday–Friday IMSR update.

So the exact figure now available (closest to late June) is **3,330,901 acres as of July 6, 2026**, sourced from the Incident Management Situation Report (IMSR) published by the National Interagency Coordination Center.
